data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Fred E. Karlinsky Named to News Service of Florida's '50 Over 50' List
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida on April 21, 2026, Fred E. Karlinsky, Global Insurance Regulatory & Transactions Practice Chair at Greenberg Traurig, P.A., was acknowledged on News Service of Florida's 2026 "50 Over 50" list. An awards reception is scheduled for April 22 to honor the recipients.

data.title: Century Communities Hosting April Grand Opening Block Party at New Katy, TX Community
data.description: On April 25, 2026, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a leading national homebuilder known for its prominence in online home sales and recognition on lists like America's Most Trustworthy Companies and World's Most, is set to reveal two new model homes. This event will take place in Houston, showcasing the company's innovative designs and craftsmanship. Keep an eye out for this exciting unveiling from the renowned builder.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- GENYOUth/
data.description: The NFL Foundation has selected schools and districts across the country for their new Flag-in-School Play 60 Champions Initiative. The initiative, launched on April 21, 2026 by GENYOUth, aims to promote physical activity and healthy behavior among students. The program will be implemented in several educational institutions nationwide. For further details mentioned in the 5th paragraph of the press release, individuals are directed to the provided link for more information.

data.title: Taiko hits milestone with 100% ZK coverage, reduces mainnet finality to 2s, aiming for 2025 goals: 100% ZK proof, 2s finality, DAO governance.
data.description: In 2025, Taiko aims to achieve significant milestones in Ethereum scaling. By that year, the company plans to achieve 100% zero-knowledge (ZK) proof coverage and implement a fast 2-second finality. Additionally, Taiko aims to adopt DAO governance to enhance its position as a pioneering figure in the industry. These goals showcase Taiko's determination to revolutionize Ethereum scaling by leveraging cutting-edge technologies and innovative governance structures.

data.title: Simplify Group™ Launches Simplify Alpha™: Managed Outcomes for Healthcare Payers, Powered by a Proven Payer Ecosystem
data.description: Today, in Aurora, Illinois, Simplify Group™ introduced Simplify Alpha™, a Solutions-as-a-Service (SolaaS) firm focused on enhancing payer operations. This new venture will leverage a connected AI platform, agentic automation, and the comprehensive operational and technological framework of a longstanding 17-year payer ecosystem. The launch signifies a strategic shift for Simplify Group™ from platform-centric innovation to result-oriented implementation. The company aims to address inefficiencies in payer operations, with significant financial stakes involved in the billions of dollars.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- American Academy of Dermatology/
data.description: The American Academy of Dermatology has released their inaugural pediatric atopic dermatitis guidelines, emphasizing prevention tactics and successful treatments. The guidelines were issued on April 7, 2026, marking a significant advancement in addressing this condition in children. This release comes as the 5th edition of the guidelines, indicating the importance of providing updated and comprehensive recommendations. These guidelines aim to improve the management of pediatric atopic dermatitis and enhance the quality of care for young patients.

data.title: POETS&QUANTS RECOGNIZES THE BARNEY BARNETT SCHOOL OF BUSINESS AND FREE ENTERPRISE AT FLORIDA SOUTHERN COLLEGE AS A TOP UNDERGRADUATE PROGRAM
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on April 21, 2026, Florida Southern College revealed that the Barney Barnett School of Business and Free Enterprise has secured a spot on the prestigious Poets&Quants for Undergrads' 2026 list of the Best Undergraduate Business Schools. This recognition further solidifies the school's reputation for excellence in business education and elevates its standing among top institutions.

data.title: NOVA SOUTHEASTERN UNIVERSITY ANNOUNCES 2026 COMMENCEMENT SPEAKERS
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on April 21, 2026, Nova Southeastern University (NSU) announced a lineup of acclaimed keynote speakers for their upcoming 2026 commencement ceremonies. Spanning from Monday, May 4 to Thursday, May 14, NSU is set to conduct 10 graduation events, awarding a total of thousands of degrees to graduating students.

data.title: Great Mother March Completes 32-Day Walk of Love, Arrives on National Mall as Only Earth Day Gathering
data.description: In honor of Earth Day, the Great Mother March will conclude its 32-day journey from Asheville, North Carolina, by arriving at the National Mall in Washington on April 21, 2026. This event will be the sole Earth Day celebration held on the National Mall this year, highlighting the significance of this walking pilgrimage.

data.title: Conversational AI Leaders Named in 2026 Data Quadrant Report by Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: The Info-Tech Research Group's 2026 Conversational AI Data Quadrant Report reveals the leading providers assisting organizations in offering intelligent, scalable interactions, improving user experiences, and automating service delivery through various channels. The rankings are determined by feedback from end users and showcase the top performers in the industry.

data.title: VSI® Surgeons Perform World's First Spine Surgery with Stealth AXiS™ Autopilot Robotic System
data.description: Surgeons Dr. Christopher Good, Dr. Colin Haines, and Dr. Ehsan Jazini are at the forefront of a groundbreaking spine surgery at VSI in Reston, Virginia. This procedure highlights VSI's reputation for surgical innovation and excellence. The announcement was made on April 21, 2026, via PRNewswire, showcasing VSI as a top spine center in the country. The surgery is set to raise the bar in the field of spine surgery and uphold VSI's legacy.

data.title: TeamHive Launches Free Team Effectiveness Indicator, Giving Any Leader or Team Member Instant, Research-Backed Insight Into How Their Team Really Works
data.description: A human resource technology platform, endorsed by the University of Newcastle, is offering its PLUS model diagnostic tool for free to teams globally. TeamHive unveiled the release of the tool on April 21, 2026, in Sydney. The platform's website is team-hive.co.

data.title: GEMI Investor Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages GEMI Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
data.description: If you purchased GEMI Class A common stock and/or securities within the period of September 12, 2025, to February 17, 2026, you may be impacted by a securities fraud class action lawsuit filed against Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI). The class period for the lawsuit spans from September 12, 2025, to February 17, 2026.

data.title: Sloane Scott, an Industry Powerhouse in Experience Strategy, Named PRA's Mid-South Regional Vice President
data.description: A seasoned professional and strategic expert has been selected to guide PRA's Mid-South region towards a new phase of innovation and growth. The company, renowned for its expertise in business events and destination management, revealed that Sloane Scott will assume the role of Regional Vice President. The announcement was made in Chicago on April 21, 2026. This move is expected to drive the region towards further development and expansion under Sloane Scott's leadership.
